scripts.build: echo "Run package-specific builds (e.g. npm run build -w apps/web)"
scripts.lint: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const cp=require('child_process');const files=cp.execSync('find apps/api/src -name \"*.js\" -type f').toString().trim().split('\n');let ok=true;files.forEach(f=>{try{new Function(fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8'))}catch(e){console.error(f+': '+e.message);ok=false}});if(!ok)process.exit(1);console.log('All JS files pass syntax check')"
